outline.title: Digzio Technology Overview
outline.summary: Title slide introducing the presentation on Digzio's full-stack architecture, microservices, and mobile apps (iOS + Android).
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Architecture Overview
outline.summary: Overview of the production-grade microservices platform running on AWS Cape Town, detailing the 9 independent services, containerization, load balancing, database, and CDN.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Frontend — Web Platform
outline.summary: Details the modern, responsive web application built with React, TypeScript, Vite, TailwindCSS, and state management tools, deployed on AWS ECS.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Backend Microservices
outline.summary: Breaks down the 8 specialized Node.js microservices (auth, property, application, image, kyc, lease, notification, institution) and their responsibilities.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Data & Storage
outline.summary: Highlights the storage infrastructure built for scale: TiDB for primary data, Redis for caching, AWS S3 for files, CloudFront for CDN, and SES for email.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Infrastructure & DevOps
outline.summary: Explains the fully containerized, production-ready setup on AWS af-south-1 using ECR, ECS Fargate, ALB, and CI/CD pipelines.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Mobile App — React Native
outline.summary: Showcases the single codebase approach for iOS and Android using Expo, React Native, TypeScript, NativeWind, and performance optimization tools.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Mobile Build & Distribution
outline.summary: Details the cloud-based native builds using EAS Build, covering Android APK/AAB distribution, iOS simulator/IPA builds, and OTA updates.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Security Architecture
outline.summary: Outlines the security-first design across all layers, including JWT auth, bcrypt hashing, Helmet.js, rate limiting, HTTPS, and secure token storage.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Built for Scale
outline.summary: Closing slide summarizing the platform's production readiness, current live status, scalability, and future technical roadmap.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed
